assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Acceptance Criteria are vague — specifically calling out 'search results are relevant' and 'performance is acceptable' as insufficiently specific for implementation

assertion_results.evidence: Section '**4. assertion_results.text: The response asks at least 3 specific clarifying questions about: which fields to search, what relevance ranking means, and what performance threshold is required

Specifically: (1) Question 2 asks 'Which fields are searchable (package name, version, license, purl)?' (line 69); (2) Question 4 asks 'Should relevance ranking be implemented, or is this a simple contains/prefix match?' (line 82); (3) Question 4 also asks 'Is there a performance target (e.g., response time, maximum result set)?' (line 81). All three specific topics are covered.
